# MuleSoft Anypoint CLI

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (4.x) of Anypoint CLI documentation.
> See [Anypoint CLI llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/llms-full.txt) for all the Anypoint CLI documentation in one file.

## Content

- [CLI for Anypoint Platform Accounts](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/account.md)
- [CLI for Agent Fabric Plugin](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/agent-fabric.md)
- [Anypoint Platform CLI Release Notes](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/anypoint-cli-release-notes.md)
- [Anypoint CLI 4.x List of Commands](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/anypoint-platform-cli-commands.md)
- [API Catalog CLI](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/api-catalog.md)
- [CLI for API Governance](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/api-governance.md)
- [CLI for API Manager](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/api-mgr.md)
- [Authentication to the Anypoint Platform CLI](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/auth.md)
- [CLI for CloudHub Applications](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/cloudhub-apps.md)
- [CLI for CloudHub Dedicated Load Balancers](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/cloudhub-dlb.md)
- [CLI for Anypoint Virtual Private Cloud](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/cloudhub-vpc.md)
- [CLI for CloudHub](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/cloudhub.md)
- [CLI for Cloudhub 2.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/cloudhub2-apps.md)
- [CLI for DataGraph Load Balancers](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/datagraph-load-balancer.md)
- [CLI for Design Center Projects](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/design-center.md)
- [How Version 4.x Differs from Previous Versions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/diff-earlier-ver.md)
- [CLI for DX Mule Plugin](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/dx-mule.md)
- [CLI for Exchange Assets](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/exchange-assets.md)
- [Anypoint Platform CLI 4.x Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/index.md)
- [Install Anypoint CLI 4.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/install.md)
- [CLI for Managed Omni Gateways](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/managed-gateways.md)
- [CLI for PDK Policy Projects](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/pdk-plugin.md)
- [Using Anypoint CLI with a Network Proxy](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/proxy.md)
- [CLI for Managing Apps in Runtime Fabric](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/runtime-fabric-apps.md)
- [CLI for Runtime Manager](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/runtime-manager.md)
- [CLI for Secrets Manager](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/secrets-manager.md)
- [CLI for Local Server Clusters](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/server-clusters.md)
- [CLI for Local Server Groups](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/server-groups.md)
- [CLI for Local Servers](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/servers.md)
- [CLI for Hybrid Application Alerts](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/standalone-alerts.md)
- [Locally Deployed Applications Managed by Runtime Manager](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-cli/latest/standalone-apps.md)
